case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. M BRETT BUTTERFIELD et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED NOV-26-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED NOV-26-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
NON-SERVICE REPORT: ATTEMPTING TO SERVE SUMMONS,COMPLAINT, AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE ON DEFENDANT AT HOME ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $442.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $300.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
CASE SUMMARY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT $12,741.70 PRINCIPAL, $725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $442.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,909.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, M BRETT
